findings.title: Double-spend race condition (TOCTOU)
findings.description: Balance is checked outside $transaction. Two concurrent requests can both pass the check and deduct, resulting in negative balance.
findings.remediation: Use UPDATE ... WHERE balance >= amount inside $transaction

findings.title: Balance stored as Float (floating-point money)
findings.description: Float type causes IEEE 754 precision errors on financial calculations. E.g., 5000 * 0.8 != 4000 exactly.
findings.remediation: Migrate to BigInt storing centimos (1 Kz = 100 centimos)

findings.title: Multicaixa Express is 100% mock
findings.description: All payment functions return fake success when NODE_ENV=development or no API key. Unitel Money has zero implementation.
findings.remediation: Obtain sandbox credentials, implement real API integration, end-to-end tests

findings.title: JWT secrets hardcoded with dev fallbacks
findings.description: ACCESS_SECRET and REFRESH_SECRET fall back to 'dev-access-secret' and 'dev-refresh-secret' if env vars are missing. Additionally, .env uses JWT_SECRET (wrong name), so the code ALWAYS uses the fallback.
findings.remediation: Remove fallbacks, add fail-fast env validation

findings.title: .env committed to git history
findings.description: The .env file with DB credentials, JWT secrets, and RTMP secret was committed and is permanently in git history.
findings.remediation: Rotate all secrets. Run git filter-repo to purge history. Install git-secrets pre-commit hook.

findings.title: No HTTP rate limiting on any endpoint
findings.description: No express-rate-limit or similar middleware. OTP brute-force (6 digits = 1M combinations), wallet spam, and DDoS are all possible.
findings.remediation: Add express-rate-limit with tiered limits per endpoint category

findings.title: SMS service is console.log only (mock)
findings.description: sendSms() only prints to console. No real SMS is ever sent. OTP codes are invisible to real users.
findings.remediation: Integrate Africa's Talking or Twilio in sandbox mode

findings.title: HMAC signature verification bypassed in dev
findings.description: verifySignature returns true unconditionally when NODE_ENV=development.
findings.remediation: Remove bypass, use test webhook secret for dev

findings.title: No webhook idempotency handling
findings.description: processWebhook does not check if transaction was already completed. Retried webhooks credit balance multiple times.
findings.remediation: Check Transaction.status before processing. Add idempotencyKey field.

findings.title: Admin can set balance directly without audit trail
findings.description: updateUser accepts balance in body and sets it directly. No logging, no audit record, no before/after tracking.
findings.remediation: Remove balance from updateUser. Create separate audit-logged balance adjustment endpoint.

findings.title: OTP uses Math.random() (not crypto-secure)
findings.description: Math.random() is predictable. An attacker who can observe V8 engine state could predict future OTP codes.
findings.remediation: Use crypto.randomInt(100000, 999999)

findings.title: Media server HTTP has allow_origin: '*'
findings.description: Any origin can access HLS streams. Should be restricted to frontend URL.
findings.remediation: Set allow_origin to FRONTEND_URL env var

findings.title: node-media-server is single-instance, no CDN/VOD
findings.description: Cannot scale horizontally. No CDN for latency. No recording/VOD. No ABR (adaptive bitrate).
findings.remediation: Evaluate Cloudflare Stream or Mux for managed CDN. See streaming-plan.md

findings.title: Zero automated test coverage
findings.description: No test framework installed. No unit, integration, or e2e tests. Only a manual test-auth.ts script using obsolete endpoints.
findings.remediation: Install Vitest, write tests for wallet/auth/donations, set up CI pipeline

findings.title: N+1 queries in leaderboard
findings.description: getLeaderboard fires N individual user queries instead of a single IN query.
findings.remediation: Use prisma.user.findMany({ where: { id: { in: senderIds } } })

findings.title: Stream keys are static (never expire/rotate)
findings.description: streamKey is set once and never rotated. If leaked, anyone can stream as that user indefinitely.
findings.remediation: Add streamKey rotation endpoint + automatic rotation on security events

findings.title: Chat bans stored in-memory
findings.description: Bans and timeouts stored in an in-process Map. Lost on server restart.
findings.remediation: Move to Redis or database storage

findings.title: All logging is console.log/error
findings.description: No structured logging (Pino/Winston). No request IDs. No log levels. Makes debugging in production extremely difficult.
findings.remediation: Install Pino, add request-id middleware, structured log format

findings.title: RTMP secret has hardcoded fallback
findings.description: process.env.RTMP_SECRET || 'kwanza-rtmp-secret' — known fallback.
findings.remediation: Remove fallback, add to required env validation

findings.title: No consistent error boundaries / loading states
findings.description: error.tsx exists but per-component error handling is inconsistent. Loading states are not uniformly implemented.
findings.remediation: Add error boundaries and skeleton loaders to all page components
